# API Requirements Quality Checklist: Open EMF Camper API Core

**Purpose**: Validate core HTTP API, database aggregation, and external bank integration specifications before proceeding to tasks breaking or code implementation.
**Created**: 2026-07-10
**Feature**: [../spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are the specific HTTP headers, request bodies, and expected HTTP response codes documented for all mutative logging routes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Does the specification define the default metrics values and category parameters zeroed out during the daily tracker reset? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK003 Are the AWS Secrets Manager credentials, token mappings, and rotation frequencies documented for the background Monzo bank synchronization? [Completeness, Dependency, Spec §User Story 4]
- [ ] CHK004 Are performance latency requirements specified for the telemetry write Lambda handlers? [Completeness, Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is the formatting formula for credit transactions labeled `(CREDIT)` clarified with specific division and pence-to-pounds re-mapping rules? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK006 Are the precise coordinate properties and decimal precision defined for the history response payload? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK007 Are the dynamic status-to-image URL resolution rules explicitly documented with concrete image filenames and domain bindings? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do the custom drink logging requirements for `/beer` align consistently with the combined drinks and beers aggregate structure? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK009 Are active mood status resolution parameters consistent with the public S3 static website hosting layout? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK010 Is the success outcome 'aggregate count increments' (User Story 1) testable and verifiable at the HTTP protocol layer? [Measurability, Spec §User Story 1]
- [ ] CHK011 Can the 'totals query success criteria' be objectively verified without knowing implementation details? [Measurability, Spec §User Story 2]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK012 Are requirements defined for logging non-standard custom drink text entries that do not match the beer categories list? [Coverage, Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK013 Does the specification define how the API handles a 'stop' learning event if no matching 'start' event is found in the database? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK014 Are accounting requirements specified for logging corrections via the `"reverse": true` parameter? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK015 Are the initial coordinate calculations and steps-counter defaults defined for when the first location point is loaded? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK016 Are the Earth distance estimation limits and mean stride conversions (0.63 meters) testable and defined? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-004]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK017 Are API Gateway CORS allowed headers, methods, and origin domains explicitly defined in the requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
